prompt: SETUP (do this before responding to the user): Call vulcan_ingest_git for the repository at /home/aditya/workspaces/pycharm/temporal_reasoning to start background indexing. Wait for confirmation it started. Then respond to this user message: 'Can you kick off the codebase indexing? I want to query function dependencies once it's done.'

assertions.text: Claude calls vulcan_ingest_status to check current ingestion state before responding to the user
Claude does NOT call vulcan_ingest_git a second time when status shows ingestion is already running
Claude reports commits_done and commits_total (or equivalent progress fields) from the live status result
Claude informs the user that indexing is already in progress and they do not need to start it again
Claude does not attempt to manually store code entities via vulcan_transact as a substitute for ingestion
